error_signature: Nav Bar not sticking to right-hand side
title: Mobile Nav Bar not positioned correctly
symptom: The mobile navigation bar is defaulting to the left-hand side instead of the desired right-hand side.
applies_when: Using the Nav Bar element in mobile mode
Nav Bar is not positioned as intended
not_this_if: Nav Bar is already positioned correctly
root_cause: The default positioning of the Nav Bar element may not align with user preferences. Adjusting the position settings is necessary to achieve the desired layout.
fix_steps: Select the Nav Bar element in the editor
Set the Absolute position Right setting to 0 px
Save the changes and preview the mobile view
agent_instruction: Adjust the Absolute position Right setting of the Nav Bar to 0 px.
